name: deepagents-app-workspace

scripts.build: pnpm --filter deepagents-app-ts build && pnpm --filter deepagents-flow-ts build && pnpm --filter inspector build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter deepagents-app-ts test && pnpm --filter deepagents-flow-ts test && pnpm --filter inspector test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter deepagents-app-ts typecheck && pnpm --filter deepagents-flow-ts typecheck

description: DeepAgents development templates — monorepo for agent template and dev-agent config
